mapper.select: WITH today_data AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(vehicle_count), 0) AS total FROM traffic_congestion WHERE DATE(recorded_at) = CURRENT_DATE ), yesterday_data AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(vehicle_count), 0) AS total FROM traffic_congestion WHERE DATE(recorded_at) = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' ), latest_sensor AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (equipment_id) equipment_id, risk_score, recorded_at FROM sensor_log ORDER BY equipment_id, recorded_at DESC ) SELECT (SELECT total FROM today_data) AS todayTrafficTotal, CASE WHEN (SELECT total FROM yesterday_data) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( ( ((SELECT total FROM today_data) - (SELECT total FROM yesterday_data)) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM yesterday_data), 0) )::numeric, 1 ) END AS trafficChangeRate, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM violation_log WHERE fine_status = 'UNPROCESSED' ) AS unprocessedCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM latest_sensor WHERE risk_score >= 0.60 ) AS riskEquipmentCount

WITH days AS ( SELECT generate_series( CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 day', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day' )::date AS day ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tc.vehicle_count), 0)::int FROM days d LEFT JOIN traffic_congestion tc ON DATE(tc.recorded_at) = d.day GROUP BY d.day ORDER BY d.day

SELECT alert_text FROM ( SELECT v.detected_at AS event_time, '[' || TO_CHAR(v.detected_at, 'HH12:MI AM') || '] ' || COALESCE(v.plate_number, '번호판 미확인') || ' ' || v.violation_type || ' / ' || COALESCE(i.name, '교차로 미확인') AS alert_text FROM violation_log v JOIN intersection i ON v.intersection_id = i.intersection_id
UNION ALL
SELECT s.created_at AS event_time, '[' || TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'HH12:MI AM') || '] ' || '신호 제어 - ' || COALESCE(i.name, '교차로 미확인') || ': ' || s.control_type AS alert_text FROM signal_control_log s JOIN intersection i ON s.intersection_id = i.intersection_id ) alerts ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 5
